description: System-wide observability dashboard for JVM, CPU, and process resource health across chrono-queue services. Includes saturation and alert-signal panels for CPU, memory pressure, GC pause, thread anomalies, file descriptor usage, and restarts.

panels.title: JVM Heap Used — All Services
panels.description: JVM heap memory used (bytes) per service.

panels.title: JVM Heap Used % — All Services

targets.expr: clamp_max(clamp_min(100 * sum by (service) (jvm_memory_used_bytes{service=~"${service:regex}", area="heap", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"${env:regex}"}) / clamp_min(sum by (service) (jvm_memory_max_bytes{service=~"${service:regex}", area="heap", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"${env:regex}"}), 1e-9), 0), 100)

panels.description: JVM heap used as a percentage of max heap per service.

panels.title: JVM GC Pause Rate (pauses/s) — All Services
panels.description: JVM GC pause event rate (pauses per second) per service.

panels.title: JVM GC Pause Latency p99 — All Services

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, service) (clamp_min(rate(jvm_gc_pause_seconds_bucket{service=~"${service:regex}", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"${env:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: p99 JVM GC pause latency per service.

panels.title: JVM GC Pause Latency p95 — All Services

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, service) (clamp_min(rate(jvm_gc_pause_seconds_bucket{service=~"${service:regex}", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"${env:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: p95 JVM GC pause latency per service.

panels.title: JVM Live Threads — All Services
panels.description: JVM live thread count per service.

panels.title: JVM Non-Heap Memory Used
panels.description: JVM non-heap memory used (bytes) per service.

panels.title: JVM Classes Loaded
panels.description: JVM loaded classes count per service.

panels.title: JVM Daemon vs Total Threads
panels.description: JVM daemon and total live thread counts per service.

panels.title: CPU Saturation % — Per Service
panels.description: Per-service CPU saturation signal. Sustained values >80% indicate CPU pressure.

panels.title: Memory Pressure % — Per Service

targets.expr: clamp_max(clamp_min(100 * sum by (service) (jvm_memory_used_bytes{service=~"${service:regex}", area="heap", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"${env:regex}"}) / clamp_min(sum by (service) (jvm_memory_max_bytes{service=~"${service:regex}", area="heap", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"${env:regex}"}), 1e-9), 0), 100)

panels.description: Per-service JVM heap pressure as a saturation indicator.

panels.title: Restart Detection — Per Service
panels.description: Counts process restarts from start-time changes. Non-zero values indicate restart events.

panels.title: GC Pause p99 Signal — Per Service

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, service) (clamp_min(rate(jvm_gc_pause_seconds_bucket{service=~"${service:regex}", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"${env:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]), 0)))

panels.description: Service-level GC p99 pause signal for alerting on stop-the-world pressure.

panels.title: Thread Count Anomaly (z-score) — Per Service

targets.expr: abs((avg by (service) (jvm_threads_live_threads{service=~"${service:regex}", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"${env:regex}"}) - avg_over_time((avg by (service) (jvm_threads_live_threads{service=~"${service:regex}", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"${env:regex}"}))[1h:])) / clamp_min(stddev_over_time((avg by (service) (jvm_threads_live_threads{service=~"${service:regex}", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"${env:regex}"}))[1h:]), 1e-9))

panels.description: Absolute z-score of live thread count per service. Values >3 indicate anomalous thread behavior.

panels.title: File Descriptor Usage % — Per Service

targets.expr: 100 * sum by (service) (process_files_open_files{service=~"${service:regex}", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"${env:regex}"}) / clamp_min(sum by (service) (process_files_max_files{service=~"${service:regex}", instance=~"${instance:regex}", env=~"${env:regex}"}), 1)

panels.description: Open file descriptors as a percent of max per service (saturation indicator).

panels.title: Process CPU Usage — All Services
panels.description: JVM process CPU usage (0–1 mapped to 0–100 %) per service.

panels.title: System CPU Usage
panels.description: System CPU usage (0–1 mapped to 0–100 %) per service.

panels.title: Memory Usage (Process RSS) — All Services
panels.description: Cross-service memory usage using process RSS (bytes), aggregated by service.

panels.title: Process Open File Descriptors
panels.description: Process open file descriptor count per service.

panels.title: Process Uptime
panels.description: Process uptime (seconds) per service.

title: Whole System — JVM, CPU, Process Resources
